rationale: The citing editorial does more than list the paper in background references; it explicitly discusses Fournier and Eckhardt (2019) in the branding section. It summarizes the paper's method (extended case method) and uses its findings on consistency and authenticity to support the editorial's argument about cross-method conversations in branding research at JMR. This is a meaningful framing and evidentiary use within the citing paper, even though the editorial does not directly extend or test the cited paper.
relation_description: The citing paper uses the cited paper as a concrete empirical example in its branding synthesis, drawing on its method and conclusions to illustrate diversity of methods and shared constructs in JMR branding research.
